name: Blood Purge
rulesText:
Barbarian Ability — Recruit
Reaction • Status

When a Poison status card would be placed in this character’s Status Row, prevent that card from being placed.

Remove all Poison status cards from this character’s Status Row. Then move Blood Purge from its equipped Skill Card into this character’s Status Row.

While Blood Purge is active, Poison status cards cannot be placed on this character.

At the end of combat, return Blood Purge to its equipped Skill Card.

source.sourceSection: Recruit Barbarian Ability Cards > Blood Purge
source.notes: Blood Purge is a reaction that prevents the triggering Poison card, removes any Poison cards already affecting its owner, and occupies the owner’s Status Row as temporary poison immunity until combat ends.
